engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a skilled tradesperson/firm with their home floors — the page sells defined expertise via 'why choose us', vetting advice, founder intro (Meet Ben), quality assurance, and 5.0 Google reviews. Portfolio photos exist but support trust, they aren't the primary decision spine.

goal.one_action: request a floor-restoration quote (or call the number)

structure.archetype_note: WordPress local-trade site: long persuasive home page + per-service pages + dedicated contact/quote form page

mapped.observed_as: Professional Wood Floor Sanding and Restoration
Osborne Woodcare is one of the leading names in wooden floor restoration
Floor sanding in Hertfordshire since 2012 (Meet Ben)
Be critical in your search for a wood floor restoration company
We never cut corners with our floor restoration services
Hardwood flooring is a lifetime investment
The long-term benefits of floor sanding
Wood Floor Sanding and Restoration FAQ

unmapped.why_no_fit: Service-area coverage list is a recurring local-trade section (which towns/postcodes served) with no clean canonical id — mapped to miscellaneous but is a distinct pattern

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; clear trade-service intent, one conversion action (quote form / call), sections and CTAs unambiguous

gap_findings: Service-area coverage list ('We Serve These Areas!') is a common local-trade section with no canonical section id — currently absorbed into miscellaneous
Google Reviews shown via external widget (79 reviews / 5.0) rather than on-page testimonials — proof is a third-party review-widget embed, only loosely covered by socialProof
